title: Programs and policy development – Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Programs and policy development – Health Canada
Health programs and policies and activities related to their development to support the Government of Canada. This includes consultations, frameworks, plans and research.
- Advisory boards and committees
- International activities
- Health care systems analysis and policy
- Access, affordability and appropriate use of drugs and medical devices
- Home, community and palliative care
- Substance use and addictions
- Medical assistance in dying
- Blood systems, organs, tissue and transplantation
- Promoting minority official languages in the health care system
- The territorial health investment fund (THIF)
- Pharmaceutical drugs
- Biologics and radiopharmaceuticals
- Natural health products
- Health impacts of chemicals
- Consumer product safety
- Workplace hazardous products
- Controlled substances
- Radiation protection
- Specialized health services and internationally protected persons program
- Health-related consultations

## Advisory boards and committees
- External advisory boards
- Drug product scientific/expert advisory committees
- Medical device scientific/expert advisory committees

## International activities
View Health Canada's participation in international activities , including global health issues and international agreements.
- Health science and research
- Monitoring and surveillance
- Determinants of health
